summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Task Detail Dialog, Task Approvals in Approvals view, and New Task Dialog features. All 22 backend tests passed (100%). All frontend UI tests passed - Task Detail Dialog opens on card title click, shows all metadata (status, brand, priority, due date, created date), edit mode works with editable fields, save changes persists data. Approvals view shows task approvals with TASK badge, 'Approve & Complete' and 'Send Back' buttons work correctly. New Task Dialog has description and priority fields.

issues: Minor: Console warning about missing Description or aria-describedby for DialogContent - accessibility improvement needed

passed_tests: Backend: PATCH /api/v1/tasks/:id updates title correctly
Backend: PATCH /api/v1/tasks/:id updates description correctly
Backend: PATCH /api/v1/tasks/:id updates due_date correctly
Backend: PATCH /api/v1/tasks/:id updates priority correctly (all values: low, normal, high, urgent)
Backend: PATCH /api/v1/tasks/:id updates user_note correctly
Backend: PATCH /api/v1/tasks/:id updates multiple fields at once
Backend: PATCH /api/v1/tasks/:id returns 404 for non-existent task
Backend: GET /api/v1/approvals includes tasks with status 'approval'
Backend: Task approval items have type='task_approval'
Backend: Task approval items have source='task'
Backend: Task approval items have priority field
Backend: Task approval items have due_date field
Backend: Task approval items have subject from task title
Backend: GET /api/v1/approvals brand filter works for task approvals
Backend: Completing a task removes it from approvals list
Backend: 'Send Back' (status=open) removes task from approvals
Backend: Regression - GET /api/v1/brands works
Backend: Regression - GET /api/v1/stats works
Backend: Regression - GET /api/v1/tasks works
Backend: Regression - GET /api/v1/approvals works
Backend: Regression - GET /api/v1/activity works
Backend: Regression - Email approvals still appear in approvals list
Frontend: Clicking task card title opens TaskDetailDialog
Frontend: Detail dialog shows status badge
Frontend: Detail dialog shows brand pill
Frontend: Detail dialog shows priority (when not normal)
Frontend: Detail dialog shows due date in metadata row
Frontend: Detail dialog shows created date in metadata row
Frontend: Detail dialog shows description section
Frontend: Detail dialog shows user notes section
Frontend: Detail dialog has 'Move To' status buttons for transitions
Frontend: Edit button switches to edit mode
Frontend: Edit mode shows title input field
Frontend: Edit mode shows due date input (editable)
Frontend: Edit mode shows priority select
Frontend: Edit mode shows description textarea
Frontend: Edit mode shows notes textarea
Frontend: Save Changes button saves and returns to view mode
Frontend: Cancel button cancels edit mode
Frontend: Close button closes the dialog
Frontend: Approvals view shows task-type items with TASK badge
Frontend: Task approval items have 'Approve & Complete' button (not 'Approve & Send')
Frontend: Task approval items have 'Send Back' button
Frontend: 'Approve & Complete' marks task as completed and removes from approvals
Frontend: 'Send Back' moves task back to open and removes from approvals
Frontend: Email approvals still have 'Approve & Send' button
Frontend: Email approvals still have 'Edit Draft' and 'Discard' buttons
Frontend: New Task dialog has description field
Frontend: New Task dialog has priority field with options (low, normal, high, urgent)
Frontend: New Task dialog has due date field
Regression: Kanban board has 4 columns (Open, In Progress, Approval, Completed)
Regression: Drag-and-drop works (task moved between columns)
Regression: All navigation views work (Overview, Approvals, Tasks, Inboxes, Schedule, Calendar, Activity)
critical_code_review_comments: Minor: DialogContent in TaskDetailDialog.js should have DialogDescription for accessibility (console warning)
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_ prefixed tasks during testing for task update and approval tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Task Detail Dialog fully tested and working. Opens when clicking task card title (data-testid='kanban-card-title-{id}'). Shows status badge, brand pill, priority, due date, created date, description, user notes, and 'Move To' status buttons. Edit mode allows editing all fields including due date. Save persists changes via PATCH /api/v1/tasks/:id. Approvals view now shows both email approvals (with 'Approve & Send') and task approvals (with 'Approve & Complete' and 'Send Back'). Task approvals have TASK badge, priority, and due date. New Task Dialog has description and priority fields. Test file at /app/backend/tests/test_task_detail_approvals.py covers all PATCH task update and task approval endpoints.
